calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-19-2013 Off Calendar

Request For Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Jul-23-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos and Mars Goodman, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

Jan A. Kopczynski, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, Candlestick Point - The Cove Homeowner's Association, a California Corporation.
Witness: Teri Atkins Sworn and examinded on behalf of Plaintiff.

No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) Gil Del Rosario, Richard Manunta, and Leilani Manunta,
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Declarations and Exhibits admitted into evidence.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Judgment in favor of Plaintiff Candlestick Point - The Cove Homeowners Association and against Defendants Gil Del Rosario, Richard Manunta, and Leilani Manunta.

It is hereby ordered, adjudged, and decreed that Judgment be, and hereby is entered against defendants Gil Del Rosario, Richard Manunta, and Leilani Manunta in the amount of $31,616.09.

Judgment signed in open court.
